raw_consumer_statement:
I have submitted a dispute because I purchase a resort stay on my card. I was not able to take the trip due to Hurricane Beryl. The resort refused to issue a refund. 

I sent over the XXXX XXXX advising state of emergency and my cancelled flights. 

Citi bank closed the dispute in favor of the merchant. I never received my service and it was a state of emergency. 

I have been going through this since XXXX it is now XXXX. I have spoken to multiple supervisors that have also sent requests in to reopen the dispute and I have not heard anything. Some agent are rude and told me oh well. Its expensive to conduct investigation so they are not interested in reopening the case. It is not fair that I though I was protected in the event I was charged for something I had no control over. It was a natural disaster for goodness sake. 

The fact they brushed me off and didn't even look at the supporting document I have submitted. 

I will not be working with them after this is rectified.. The stress this has caused.
